message:
fix(doctor): address review issues in Dolt diagnostics

- Use parameterized query instead of string interpolation for issue lookup
- Fix error masking in CheckDoltStatus (query failure now returns warning, not OK)
- Add labels and events to required schema tables check
- Replace deprecated filepath.Walk with filepath.WalkDir

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
